tooltip.heirloom.tempering_station: Temper gear here, one deliberate level at a time.
tooltip.heirloom.tempering_dust: Crushed mineral grit — the first step of tempering.
tooltip.heirloom.tempering_flux: A refining flux for the early tempering levels.
tooltip.heirloom.tempering_alloy: Bound metals for the middle tempering levels.
tooltip.heirloom.tempering_core: A condensed core for advanced tempering.
tooltip.heirloom.tempering_quintessence: The purest essence — for the final temper.
tooltip.heirloom.codex: A smith's journal. Right-click to read; inscribe entries with manuscripts.
tooltip.heirloom.tempering_manuscript: A fragment of tempering lore. Three inscribe a Codex entry.
tooltip.heirloom.ritual_manuscript: A fragment of ritual lore. Three inscribe a Codex entry.
tooltip.heirloom.enchanting_manuscript: A fragment of arcane lore. (Not yet usable.)
tooltip.heirloom.stonewood_helmet: Crude wood-and-stone plate. Heavy enough to resist a shove.
tooltip.heirloom.stonewood_chestplate: Crude wood-and-stone plate. Heavy enough to resist a shove.
tooltip.heirloom.stonewood_leggings: Crude wood-and-stone plate. Heavy enough to resist a shove.
tooltip.heirloom.stonewood_boots: Crude wood-and-stone plate. Heavy enough to resist a shove.
tooltip.heirloom.ritual_forge: Heat a blade here, then quench it — the sword's rite.
tooltip.heirloom.quenching_trough: Quench a heated blade to finish its rite.
tooltip.heirloom.chopping_stump: Strike a log here in rhythm — the axe's rite.
tooltip.heirloom.deepvein: A vein that flees the pick — the pickaxe's rite.
tooltip.heirloom.avalanche_cairn: Triggers a collapse to dig free of — the shovel's rite.
tooltip.heirloom.skeet_launcher: Flings targets skyward — the bow's rite.
tooltip.heirloom.bullseye_target: A distant mark for the crossbow's rite.
tooltip.heirloom.striking_plate: Launches a falling mace — the mace's rite.
tooltip.heirloom.pressure_seal: Seals a helm in the deep — the helmet's rite.
tooltip.heirloom.freeze_machine: Freezes leggings for the cold-trek rite.
tooltip.heirloom.heatbed: A burning path to walk unbroken — the boots' rite.
tooltip.heirloom.suicide_charge: Arm it, wear it, survive the blast — the chestplate's rite.
tooltip.heirloom.clay_pigeon: A clay target, flung for skeet.
